desc: Midnight Horror is a chilling series, presenting spine-tingling stories, supernatural encounters, and suspenseful thrills to keep viewers on edge.

title: Made In India - Seven Feet
desc: Years after a pandemic, a woman lives in isolation, unconvinced the danger is gone. A young doctor offers help, trying to bring her back to normal life and work.

title: Made In India
desc: She's trapped in an endless loop of 'life'. What if someone tells you that you can have a new life; but all you have to do is leave just one thing. Would you do it? She needs to decide just that.
